skills.description: Daily development of production features in a React-based microfrontend architecture. Building reusable components, managing UI state and implementing complex flows within a large enterprise frontend used in the banking sector.

Using TypeScript across the frontend codebase to enforce type safety and improve maintainability. Writing typed components, utilities and API integrations while collaborating within a large shared codebase.
Strong foundation in modern JavaScript (ES6+). Used daily to implement application logic, asynchronous operations, API communication and complex UI behaviour in production frontend applications.

Working within a microfrontend architecture where multiple teams develop independent frontend modules integrated into a shared platform. Experience navigating distributed codebases and shared dependencies.
Managing global application state for complex frontend flows using Redux. Implementing reducers, actions and selectors while maintaining predictable and scalable state management.
Using Storybook to build and document reusable UI components in isolation. Helps standardize components, test different visual states and support collaboration across teams.
Writing unit and component tests using Jest to validate frontend logic and component behaviour. Focus on preventing regressions and ensuring reliability of production features.
Building enterprise user interfaces using the Ant Design component library. Customizing components and integrating them into larger application flows.
Used in personal projects to rapidly build responsive interfaces. Helps prototype layouts efficiently while keeping styles consistent and easy to maintain.
Handling API communication between frontend and backend services using Axios. Managing request flows, error handling and integrating REST endpoints into application logic.
Regular integration with backend REST services. Implementing data fetching, managing asynchronous flows and handling API responses in complex frontend applications.
Daily use of Git for version control and collaboration. Managing branches, pull requests, code reviews and maintaining a clean commit history.
Tracking development tasks and managing tickets within an agile workflow. Used daily to organize work, follow sprint progress and collaborate with the team.
Consulting and contributing to internal documentation including development guidelines, architecture notes and project knowledge sharing.
Working within automated CI/CD pipelines used to build, test and deploy frontend applications in a large enterprise environment.
Using Jenkins pipelines as part of the team deployment workflow. Familiar with automated builds, test execution and release processes.
Implementing accessible UI patterns following web accessibility guidelines. Ensuring components support keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility.
Exposure to Google Cloud Platform through the infrastructure used by the project. Familiar with how frontend services operate within cloud-hosted environments.
Basic understanding of how applications are deployed and managed within Kubernetes clusters as part of the broader platform infrastructure.
Using Framer Motion to implement UI animations and transitions that improve user experience, mainly in personal or experimental frontend projects.
